slashCommands.name: standup-template
slashCommands.description: Insert a daily standup markdown template.

slashCommands.name: risk-scan
slashCommands.description: Ask AI for an explicit risk and mitigation scan.
slashCommands.prompt: Analyze this draft for execution risks. Return concise markdown with risks, impact, and mitigations.

slashCommands.name: tighten
slashCommands.description: Rewrite draft in a tighter, more direct style.
slashCommands.prompt: Rewrite this draft to be tighter and clearer while preserving intent. Return markdown only.

panels.title: Risk Radar
panels.description: Surfaces delivery and scope risks while drafting.
panels.prompt: List concise delivery risks and mitigations based on the draft.

panels.title: Open Questions
panels.prompt: List unanswered questions and unknowns from this draft.
